title: Toastify
description: Just say it with a toast!
body: # Toastify 🍞 ![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg) **Toastify** is a lightweight mod for sending dynamic toast to players in the server. ![toastify](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNG9hcm1jMGx0MnhkejBhMDI0amRrNTFtYXV2aXlrdGZoYnFpOWpjNyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/gDmXNjDGeZyAuuJzQu/giphy.gif) It allows Minecraft Color Codes with ```&``` like ```/toastify show @a "&1I like &4toasts! &kHi!" minecraft:bread``` ![toastify-colorcodes](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaGgwNTd3anUxdWtzM3Q5Zzhwb3kxa2Jjc2dwdWJub2J3YjBkeTVnaSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/LSpb7KFOoEMmYRuZmC/giphy.gif) In addition, you can also change toasts' base color, choosing between: - `error` - `info` - `success` - `warning` Finally you can change their duration in the screen. Note that this value is measured in milliseconds. So for example the value `7000` would be 7 seconds shown in the screen. ---- *If your toast is very big, just slice it!* ![toast-slice](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMmQybWM2aTRpZTgyeXE4dTVrbmp4aG5idjVpYnZtam5sNjA3MW5lNCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/ptAmQLBLLZl2oIY06X/giphy.gif) If the toast's message is **too big**, it'll be shortened and you can view it by hovering it. ## Consider donating! ❤️ https://ko-fi.com/javividev
